title: Final exam conflict reporting deadline
content: October 24: Deadline for students who have three (or more) final exams on our final exam day to make arrangements to change the time of their 3rd exam of the day. If this applies to you, please notify the TA ASAP and no later than the October 24 deadline. Requests submitted after the deadline will not be granted.
